title: Who Was 'Farsa Wale Baba', The Gau Rakshak Whose Death Sparked Violent Clashes And Highway Blockades?"
description: Chandrashekhar, known as 'Farsa Wale Baba', a prominent cow vigilante from Mathura, Uttar Pradesh, died in a collision while pursuing a suspected cattle smuggling truck. His death sparked widespread protests, with supporters clashing with police and blocking highways.
